Privacy Policy 隐私政策

Last Updated: March 3, 2026 最后更新日期：2026年3月3日

This Privacy Policy describes how the MaxCompute Connector for Google Sheets ("the Add-on") handles user data. By using this Add-on, you agree to the data practices described in this policy. 本隐私政策描述了 MaxCompute Google Sheets 连接器（以下简称"插件"）如何处理用户数据。使用本插件即表示您同意本政策所述的数据处理方式。

1. Data We Collect 1. 收集的数据

Connection Information 连接信息

The Add-on collects the following information that you voluntarily provide when configuring the connection: 插件收集您在配置连接时主动提供的以下信息：

  • AccessKey ID AccessKey ID
  • AccessKey Secret AccessKey Secret
  • MaxCompute Endpoint MaxCompute Endpoint
  • Project Name Project 名称

Query Data 查询数据

SQL query statements that you enter in the Add-on interface. 您在插件界面中输入的 SQL 查询语句。

Important: 重要说明： All data mentioned above is stored only in your own Google Apps Script PropertiesService. We do not transmit this data to any third-party servers. 上述所有数据仅存储在您自己的 Google Apps Script PropertiesService 中，我们不传输任何数据到第三方服务器。

2. How We Use Your Data 2. 数据使用方式

The data we collect is used solely for the following purposes: 我们收集的数据仅用于以下目的：

  • Connection information is used exclusively to connect to your own MaxCompute instance 连接信息仅用于连接您自己的 MaxCompute 实例
  • Query results are written only to your own Google Sheet 查询结果仅写入您自己的 Google Sheet

The Alibaba Cloud Add-on itself does not collect, store, or analyze any user data. 阿里云插件本身不收集、不存储、不分析任何用户数据。

3. Third-Party Services 3. 第三方服务

This Add-on connects to the following third-party services: 本插件会连接以下第三方服务：

  • Alibaba Cloud MaxCompute API (aliyun.com / alibabacloud.com) 阿里云 MaxCompute API（aliyun.com / alibabacloud.com）

For more information about how Alibaba Cloud handles your data, please refer to the 有关阿里云如何处理您的数据的更多信息，请参阅 Alibaba Cloud Privacy Policy 阿里云隐私政策 .

4. Data Security 4. 数据安全

We implement the following security measures to protect your data: 我们采取以下安全措施保护您的数据：

  • Credentials are stored securely in Google Apps Script PropertiesService 凭证安全存储在 Google Apps Script PropertiesService 中
  • All data transmission is encrypted via HTTPS 所有数据传输通过 HTTPS 加密

5. Contact Us 5. 联系方式

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us: 如果您对本隐私政策有任何疑问，请联系我们：

  • Developer: Alibaba Cloud 开发者：阿里云（Alibaba Cloud）
  • Email: 邮箱： zhangdingxin.zdx@alibaba-inc.com

6. Policy Updates 6. 政策更新

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any updates will be reflected on this page. Please check this page periodically for the latest information. 我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。任何更新将在本页面反映。请定期查看本页面以获取最新信息。
